spec.name: Soul Amplify Field
spec.summary: boosts soul energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that boosts soul energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: permanent.
